items.title: Jesus and the Eyewitnesses: The Gospels as Eyewitness Testimony. Grand Rapids: Eerdmans, 2006

items.title: Earle Ellis
items.author: Jesus' Use of the Old Testament and the Genesis of New Testament Theology 1 - E
items.why: This source directly addresses Jesus as the fulfillment of Old Testament themes, particularly in relation to Genesis. It also explores the implications of Israel's rejection of Jesus within the larger biblical narrative, making it highly relevant to the claims presented.
items.description: This source directly addresses Jesus as the fulfillment of Old Testament themes, particularly in relation to Genesis. It also explores the implications of Israel's rejection of Jesus within the larger biblical narrative, making it highly relevant to the claims presented.
